sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57207" key="khrodome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηρο-δομέω</orth>, <sense id="n57207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">build with wax</tr_>, of bees, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:174" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">174</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
